candidates.title: 2026 Insider Threat Cyber Security Statistics - Swif
candidates.snippet: The Ponemon Institute reports that the average annual cost of insider-related incidents reached $16.2 million per organization, up from $11.45 million in 2020 — a 40% increase in three years.

candidates.title: Insider threat mitigation: Systematic literature review
candidates.snippet: den 1. dec. 2024 · According to the 2023 Cost of Insider Threats Global Report, the total average cost of insider threat incidents rose from $8.3 million in 2018 to $16.2 million in 2023 [14].
